en: A: How is the weather today?
The sun is coming out, it's very hot.
A: Is it going to be cold outside?

ab: ui naljemaljeqelan, kavau ta kedremedremel a kava.
ch: B:是,很冷，要穿保暖的衣服。
en: B: It's cold, so wear warm clothes.
A: Will it be hot outside?
B: No, it's windy.
A: How is the weather today?
B: The weather is just right
A: How is the weather tonight?

ab: neka nu qerepus i kalevelevan, tjevuta anga vitjuqan uta.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星也出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky, and the stars came out.
A: How is the weather outside?
B: The rain has just stopped and the rainbow is coming out.

ab: namakuda a kalevelevan izua i tjanumun?
en: A: How is the weather there?
B: We're going to have a big storm here.
A: How's the weather there?
B: Good, big sunrise here.
A: I have to go to school.

ab: na ljemaljeqelan, paka liavu a kemava.
en: B: The weather is very cold, so wear more clothes.
A: I'm going out.

ab: paqenetju a masi ljinay, uri qemudjalj nusauni.
ch: B:等一下會下大雨，你要記得帶傘。
en: B: It's going to rain heavily, you have to remember to bring an umbrella.
A: Is it going to rain?

ab: na cemelalaq kasauni, uri qemudjalj anga.
en: B: It just thundered, it's going to rain.
A: Is it raining?

ab: ui, na qemudjalj kasauni, ljakua na meljay anga.
ch: B:是的,剛剛有下雨，現在雨停了。
en: B: It just rained, and now it's stopped.
A: Is it raining?

ab: tjevetjeveng a kadjalanan, matu na qemudjalj kasauni.
ch: B:好像下過雨了，馬路是濕的。
en: B: It seems to have rained and the road is wet.

ab: na qemudjalj? aku tjevetjeveng a su kacavacavang?
ch: A:有下雨嗎?你怎麼全身都濕了?
en: A: Is it raining? Why are you all wet?

ab: ui paljeqaca a qudjalj i sasaw, ika aken a na masi ljinay.
ch: B:是,外面下大雨，我沒有帶雨傘。
en: B: It's raining outside, so I didn't bring an umbrella.
A: What's wrong with you?

ab: namavali a aken, sika saqetjuqetju a ku qulu.
ch: B:我吹到風，所以我頭在痛。
en: B: My head is blowing in the wind, so I have a headache now.
A: Are you all right?

ab: malingac aken, qaca aravac a qadaw kasauni.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.
